tooltip.nexusreds.range_upgrade: Increases Planter area to 3x3 or line of 5.
tooltip.nexusreds.irrigation_upgrade: Keeps farmland hydrated if adjacent to water.
tooltip.nexusreds.range_upgrade_tier_2: Increases Planter area to 5x5 or line of 7.
tooltip.nexusreds.irrigation_upgrade_tie: Magically generates water and nourishes the soil.
tooltip.nexusreds.plower_upgrade: Automatically tills dirt and grass blocks broken by mobs.
tooltip.nexusreds.range_upgrade_tier_3: Increases Planter area to 7x7 or line of 10.
tooltip.nexusreds.irrigation_upgrade_tie: Generates divine water and heavily nourishes the soil.
